untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by prior period performance to identify 'Winner' and 'Loser' portfolios. This requires relative performance comparison across a universe of stocks, which cannot be expressed using single-instrument technical indicators. The signal is a cross-sectional momentum strategy (long top decile, short bottom decile) that requires portfolio construction logic beyond point-in-time indicator conditions.
translation_notes: The momentum signal is fundamentally a relative value strategy comparing stock performance rankings within a period, not a technical indicator-based entry rule. The t-statistic (2.091) and winner_loser_spread_return (0.07762) are statistical measures of strategy efficacy, not entry conditions. A proper implementation requires ranking functions and portfolio weighting logic unavailable in this indicator-based schema.
